CustomField.formula: IF( Warranty_Type__c = 'W002', DATE(YEAR(Max_Delivery_Date_From_WO__c) + 5, MONTH(Max_Delivery_Date_From_WO__c), DAY(Max_Delivery_Date_From_WO__c)), DATE(YEAR(Max_Delivery_Date_From_WO__c) + 1, MONTH(Max_Delivery_Date_From_WO__c), DAY(Max_Delivery_Date_From_WO__c)))
CustomField.label: Warranty End Date Accessories
